title: gonolobus inaequalis
intro: Gonolobus inaequalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the unequal-twisted guruba. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gonolobus inaequalis include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus inaequalis may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
